name: Documentation
about: Fix or improve docs, onboarding, or contributor experience
labels: documentation

## Before you file (read once)

- **Wrong or unclear copy on the live site?** Use the in-app **feedback widget** so product triage sees **which page** you mean. See [docs/FEEDBACK_AND_ISSUES.md](../../docs/FEEDBACK_AND_ISSUES.md).
- **Fixes to this repo’s `docs/` or Markdown?** PRs welcome — this template is for tracking when you want discussion first.

## Which doc or flow?

File path or section (e.g. `docs/GETTING_STARTED.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`).

## What is wrong or missing?

## Suggested change

(Optional) See [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
